    : global::Arbiter.Mapping.MapperProfile<global::TestApp.Models.Person, global::TestApp.Models.PersonRecord>
{
    /// <inheritdoc />
    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    public override global::TestApp.Models.PersonRecord? Map(global::TestApp.Models.Person? source)
    {
        if (source is null)
            return default;

        return new global::TestApp.Models.PersonRecord(
            source.Id,
            source.FirstName,
            source.LastName,
            source.Email,
            source.FirstName + " " + source.LastName,
            source.BirthDate.Year
        );
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    public override void Map(global::TestApp.Models.Person source, global::TestApp.Models.PersonRecord destination)
    {
        throw new NotSupportedException("Map to existing destination is not supported because all destination properties are read-only.");
    }

    private static readonly System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<Func<global::TestApp.Models.Person, global::TestApp.Models.PersonRecord>> _projectExpression =
        src => new global::TestApp.Models.PersonRecord(
            src.Id,
            src.FirstName,
            src.LastName,
            src.Email,
            src.FirstName + " " + src.LastName,
            src.BirthDate.Year
        );

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public override IQueryable<global::TestApp.Models.PersonRecord> ProjectTo(IQueryable<global::TestApp.Models.Person> source)
    {
        if (source is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(source));

        return source.Select(_projectExpression);
    }
